name: logseq
description: Logseq integration extension — block-level read/write, graph structure analysis, and Knowledge Source import from Logseq graphs.

capabilities.import: Retrieve Markdown/Org files from a Logseq graph as a Knowledge Source
capabilities.export: Output deliverables in Logseq block format
capabilities.graph_analysis: Analyze graph structure via block references and tags
capabilities.search: Keyword and tag search across the entire graph

note: Works fully offline. Simply configure the Logseq graph directory path to enable integration.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
